sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12988" key="a)poku/lisma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπο-κύλισμα</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n12988.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rolling-machine,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
